## Source: ossf-package-analysis (b994a8876bfb6c3da65e5f20b8cd611ebbb87995fa052e2f6283b5c09bfb0a91)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'amzn-consolas-client' @ 99.0.1 (crates.io) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
